model.description: DeepSeek • General-purpose V-series model optimized for reasoning, coding, and efficient inference.

pick.rationale: Nebraska's elite defense, ranked 7th nationally in adjusted efficiency, should overwhelm Troy's mediocre offense and control the game. The Cornhuskers' significant advantage in team quality, built against a rigorous Big Ten schedule, provides a level of competition that Troy has not consistently faced. While 13-seed upsets are possible, Troy's defensive limitations and lower efficiency ratings make a credible path to victory unlikely.

reasoningStep.title: Analysis of Nebraska vs Troy Matchup
reasoningStep.summary: Evaluated efficiency ratings, betting odds, and contextual factors to conclude Nebraska is the strong favorite due to superior defensive prowess and overall team quality.
evidence: Nebraska ranks 19th in Torvik and 14th in KenPom with a top-10 defense (adjde rank 7), while Troy ranks 142nd and 143rd with a weak defense (adjde rank 181). Betting markets favor Nebraska by 12.5 points, indicating high confidence in their victory. No major injuries were reported, and Nebraska's high-major experience contrasts with Troy's Sun Belt competition.
